title: Throwing a matched nested bowl set
notes: A set of five nesting bowls — 120 mm, 150 mm, 180 mm, 210 mm, 240 mm diameter — all with the same wall angle so they stack inside each other. The discipline here is consistent proportions across five throws. Each bowl is trimmed with a matching foot ring profile. Same glaze treatment. Covers the use of a profile gauge and written notes to replicate dimensions.
